title: EcoWise Strong Oval Plates - Pack of 50 Super Rigid Biodegradable Dinner Plates 10"x8" Compostable for Birthday, Christmas, BBQ
features: ✅🤍PACK OF 50 STRONG PLATES - ELEGANT OVAL DESIGN: Featuring a sleek and modern oval shape, these plates add a touch of sophistication to any dining setting. With their generous 10 x 8 inch size, these plates provide ample space for serving a variety of dishes, from appetizers to main courses and desserts.

✅💚ECO-FRIENDLY: Made from 100% Bagasse, these Oval Plates are biodegradable and compostable. By choosing these plates, you're opting for a sustainable alternative to traditional disposable plates, reducing your environmental footprint and contributing to a healthier planet.

✅🍽️DURABLE & STURDY: These white paper plates offer a sturdy construction that can withstand a variety of foods, temperatures, and serving environments. Whether you're serving hot dishes, cold salads, or saucy entrees, these plates hold up without bending, sagging, or leaking.

✅🍛MICROWAVE & FREEZER SAFE: These plates are microwave-safe, allowing you to reheat leftovers without transferring them to separate containers. Additionally, they are freezer-safe, enabling you to store pre-prepared meals or leftovers, maintaining freshness and flavour.

✅✨VERSATILE: Whether you're hosting a dinner, catering an event, or enjoying a meal with family and friends, these versatile plates are suitable for a wide range of applications. From indoor dining to outdoor picnics, these plates are a go-to choice for all your dining needs.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Biodegradable Eco-Friendly, IDEAL FOR ALL OCCASSIONS, Microwave Safe, STRONG PLATES FOR STARTER, LUNCH, DINNER - NO MORE DISH WASHING, USED FOR HOT & COLD FOODS
